# Red White Jesus -- LLM Discovery File
# https://redwhitejesus.com/llms.txt

## Organization
Name: Red White Jesus
Type: Christian-American faith and culture site
Website: https://redwhitejesus.com

## Mission
Red White Jesus explores Christian-American faith and culture. We publish content on Biblical teaching, Christian holidays, and family values. This is a faith site, not a political one.

## Content
- Biblical teaching and scripture study
- Christian holiday guides (Christmas, Easter, Lent, Advent)
- Faith and family values content
- Christian-American cultural heritage articles

## Topics Covered
- Bible study and scripture
- Christian holidays and traditions
- Christian faith in American life
- Family values and faith
- Church history and theology
- Prayer and devotional practice
- Christian community resources

## Affiliations
Part of the Wu-Tang AI Clan network of sites: webearish.com, thevoiceofcash.com, jewsa.com, u-god.com, aiskillsagents.com, allahican.com, redwhitejesus.com, autismacceptance.world, searchperformancemarketing.com, shadyscanner.com
